---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or lesson
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what you'd like to see added.

## Use Case
Why would this be useful? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution
How do you think this should work?

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or links.
